_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: we performed immunohistochemistry in skin from K14 Cre; Nf1 f/f and Nf1 f/f mice using anti-NF1 antibodies
details: Successfully demonstrated NF1 knockout in epidermis of K14 Cre; Nf1 f/f mice by immunohistochemistry
